calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Antislapp Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Semianalysis Llc'S Complaint
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings

Notice Of Motion And Antislapp Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Semianalysis Llc'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-18-2026 Continued To Jul-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WEI ZHOU's Motion And Antislapp Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Semianalysis Llc'S Complaint.

Continued to July 13, 2026, to be determined after the motion to compel arbitration and stay is decided.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
